vectors.name: aes128gcm_empty_payload
vectors.comment: empty message

vectors.name: aes128gcm_short_payload
vectors.comment: short message, single chunk

vectors.name: aes128gcm_two_chunks
vectors.comment: full chunk followed by short chunk

vectors.name: aes128gcm_two_chunks_full
vectors.comment: two full chunks followed by empty terminating chunk

vectors.name: aes128gcm_three_chunks
vectors.comment: two full chunks followed by short chunk

vectors.name: aes128gcm_last_chunk_empty
vectors.comment: full chunk followed by empty terminating chunk

vectors.name: aes128gcm_257_chunks
vectors.comment: 256 full chunks plus short chunk, tests counter rollover past 0xFF

vectors.name: aes128gcm_context
vectors.comment: short message with non-empty context string

vectors.name: aes128gcm_context_with_null
vectors.comment: short message with context containing a null byte

vectors.name: aes128gcm_bad_tag
vectors.comment: single chunk with flipped ciphertext bit

vectors.name: aes128gcm_bad_tag_second_chunk
vectors.comment: full chunk followed by corrupted short chunk

vectors.name: aes128gcm_bad_tag_second_chunk_full
vectors.comment: two full chunks with empty terminator, second chunk corrupted

vectors.name: aes128gcm_bad_tag_empty_final_chunk
vectors.comment: full chunk followed by empty terminating chunk with corrupted tag

vectors.name: aes128gcm_bad_tag_first_chunk
vectors.comment: corrupted first chunk followed by valid short chunk

vectors.name: aes128gcm_missing_tag
vectors.comment: single chunk truncated to remove authentication tag

vectors.name: aes128gcm_short_chunk
vectors.comment: payload shorter than one authentication tag

vectors.name: aes128gcm_trailing_garbage_long
vectors.comment: valid chunk followed by 20 trailing bytes

vectors.name: aes128gcm_trailing_garbage_short
vectors.comment: valid chunk followed by 12 trailing bytes

vectors.name: aes128gcm_no_chunks
vectors.comment: header only, no encrypted chunks

vectors.name: aes128gcm_wrong_commitment
vectors.comment: valid ciphertext with wrong commitment

vectors.name: aes128gcm_wrong_key
vectors.comment: valid ciphertext decrypted with wrong key

vectors.name: aes128gcm_short_key
vectors.comment: valid ciphertext encrypted with too-short key

vectors.name: aes128gcm_long_key
vectors.comment: valid ciphertext encrypted with too-long key

vectors.name: aes128gcm_wrong_context
vectors.comment: valid ciphertext decrypted with wrong context

vectors.name: aes128gcm_wrong_salt
vectors.comment: valid ciphertext with corrupted salt

vectors.name: aes128gcm_empty_message
vectors.comment: zero-length ciphertext, too short for header

vectors.name: aes128gcm_short_header_no_commitment
vectors.comment: only salt, no commitment

vectors.name: aes128gcm_short_header_partial_commitment
vectors.comment: salt and partial commitment (40 of 56 header bytes)

vectors.name: aes128gcm_short_header_no_salt
vectors.comment: too short to contain even the salt

vectors.name: aes128gcm_truncated_at_chunk_boundary
vectors.comment: full chunk without terminating empty chunk

vectors.name: aes128gcm_truncated_mid_chunk
vectors.comment: full chunk followed by second chunk truncated mid-body

vectors.name: aes128gcm_swapped_chunks
vectors.comment: two full chunks plus short final chunk, chunks 0 and 1 swapped

vectors.name: aes128gcm_duplicated_chunk
vectors.comment: chunk 0 duplicated in place of chunk 1, followed by short final chunk

vectors.name: aes128gcm_extension_after_final
vectors.comment: valid full chunk and short final chunk followed by extra encrypted chunk
